title: UK businesses have tripled their AI adoption. Most are still barely scratching the surface.
summary: Scott Pope of Nexthink argues the gap between adoption and transformation is a culture and visibility problem, not a technology one. Scott Pope of Nexthink argues the gap between adoption and transformation is a culture and visibility problem, not a technology one.
